hooks.if: Bash(git commit*) or Bash(git push*) or Bash(git -C * commit*) or Bash(git -C * push*) or Bash(cd * && git commit*) or Bash(cd * && git push*)
Bash(git switch*) or Bash(git checkout*) or Bash(cd * && git switch*) or Bash(cd * && git checkout*) or Bash(git -C * switch*) or Bash(git -C * checkout*)
Bash(git commit*) or Bash(git -C * commit*) or Bash(cd * && git commit*)
Bash(gh pr edit*) or Bash(gh -C * pr edit*)

Bash(gh pr create*) or Bash(gh pr edit*) or Bash(gh pr merge*) or Bash(gh -C * pr create*) or Bash(gh -C * pr edit*) or Bash(gh -C * pr merge*) or Bash(cd * && gh pr create*) or Bash(cd * && gh pr edit*) or Bash(cd * && gh pr merge*)
hooks.statusMessage: Scanning PR diff for non-English text...
